allow:
Bash(/tmp/show_content.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$dir = "D:/Plocha/projekty/esn-uwb-web/outstatic/content/partners"
$files = @\("nesnezeno.md", "zachranka.md", "timetravels.md"\)
foreach \($f in $files\) {
    $path = Join-Path $dir $f
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
    Write-Output "========== $f =========="
    Write-Output $content
    Write-Output ""
}
PSEOF)
